title: Rodent Proofing in Kew Gardens Hills, Queens | $500-$3,000
metaDescription: Professional rodent proofing services in Kew Gardens Hills, Queens. Protect your home from mice and rats with expert exclusion. Free estimates. Call today!
intro: Kew Gardens Hills residents face unique rodent challenges due to the neighborhood's mix of single-family homes, apartment buildings, and proximity to parks and green spaces. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive rodent proofing services throughout Kew Gardens Hills, sealing entry points and protecting your property from mice and rats year-round. Our expert technicians understand the specific pest pressures in this Queens community and deliver lasting solutions tailored to your home or business.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kew Gardens Hills for years, earning trust through effective rodent exclusion work and exceptional customer service. Our licensed technicians use proven methods and quality materials to seal your property completely, backed by our satisfaction guarantee and competitive pricing from $500 to $3,000 depending on property size and complexity.
localContext: From the tree-lined residential streets near Queens College to the multi-family buildings along Main Street and Jewel Avenue, Kew Gardens Hills properties require thorough rodent proofing to combat seasonal infestations. The neighborhood's mature landscaping and proximity to Cunningham Park create ideal conditions for rodent activity, making professional exclusion services essential for long-term protection.

faqs.question: What does rodent proofing include in Kew Gardens Hills homes?
faqs.answer: Our rodent proofing service includes a complete inspection of your property, sealing all entry points with steel wool, copper mesh, and concrete, installing door sweeps and vent covers, addressing foundation cracks, and providing detailed recommendations for ongoing prevention. We focus on gaps around pipes, utility lines, roof edges, and foundation areas where rodents commonly enter.

faqs.question: How much does rodent proofing cost in Kew Gardens Hills?
faqs.answer: Rodent proofing in Kew Gardens Hills typically ranges from $500 to $3,000, depending on your property size, the number of entry points, and the extent of work required. Single-family homes generally cost less than multi-unit buildings. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does rodent proofing last?
faqs.answer: Professional rodent proofing using quality materials typically lasts 5-10 years or longer when properly maintained. We use durable, weather-resistant materials designed to withstand New York winters and the specific conditions in Kew Gardens Hills. Regular property inspections help ensure your exclusion work remains effective over time.

faqs.question: Can rodent proofing work for both mice and rats in Queens?
faqs.answer: Yes, our rodent proofing services protect against both mice and rats, the two most common rodent species in Kew Gardens Hills. We seal openings as small as 1/4 inch for mice and larger entry points used by Norway rats and roof rats. Our comprehensive approach addresses the entry points and habits of all local rodent species.
